outputs.description: This ensures events created between fetch cycles are never missed Example: If Fetch 1 runs at 12:00 and finds events up to 11:50, it stores 12:00 as the next start time When Fetch 2 runs at 12:05, it fetches from 12:00 to 12:05, capturing any events created in that window
outputs.name: Each fetch cycle stores the fetch start time (not the last event's timestamp) as the next run's start time
